author: karstenpedersen
description: Create commands from custom queries to open random notes.

manifest.author: Karsten Finderup Pedersen
manifest.description: Open random notes with custom queries in languages like Dataview and Regex.
manifest.name: Advanced Random Note

name: Advanced Random Note

releases.author: karstenpedersen
releases.description:
- Add ribbon button.
- Open random note in folder using file right-click menu.
- Open random notes in new windows.

releases.author: karstenpedersen
releases.description: - Fix opening other files than markdown notes. #7

releases.author: karstenpedersen
releases.description:
- Fix disabled folders.
- Fix open file in new leaf setting.

releases.author: karstenpedersen
releases.description:
- Add custom query editor modal.
- Add query types:
  - Search using Dataview.
  - Search using regular expressions.
- Add queries will now also search for other file types.
- Fix root folder query in custom query language.

releases.author: karstenpedersen
releases.description: - Fix frontmatter tags to also be included in queries

releases.author: karstenpedersen
releases.description:
- Add Open Random Note command
- Add Open Random Note Modal command
- Add plugin settings tab
- Add user queries
- Add ability to toggle user queries as commands
